title: pyrrosia subvelutina
intro: Pyrrosia subvelutina, also known as Velvet Pothos or Velvet Tree Fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Pyrrosia subvelutina include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Malaysia.
